facts.value: Peter
Tom Cruise build, not The Rock; not a big man. Muscle obvious clothed off, subtle clothed on
steady with fingers thick at the knuckles from manual work
clean cotton with something warmer underneath
mouth does something warm at the corner
man
Average height but under 6 ft
Modest middle-class income for rural Virginia, plus a small cushion from a patent
uses a 'long spoon' correctly — calibrated, measured conduct where each deed is a declaration and each advance is measured against another's response
sewing and garment construction
Modest hybrid bicycle (practical middle, not carbon-road, not mountain)
years of solitude (preceding domestic compulsion habits)
Used but well-maintained truck — smaller, utilitarian, not showy
Five purpose-built pairs: hiking boots, work boots, ropers (for CW dancing), running shoes, gym shoes
Four-shirt wardrobe
His mind, which he points in the wrong direction deliberately via self-justification
fantasy refuge in sword and sorcery

value.claim: Peter's commercial intolerance is aesthetic distaste / the stock Sensitive-Intellectual 'loves old movies, hates ads' trope
value.correct_statement: It is a neurological tell — the attention being yanked mid-focus is almost physically unpleasant

value.claim: Peter is boastful when discussing his patent
value.correct_statement: He is not boasting; he'd be equally delighted explaining it to an empty room, eyes on the thing not the listener

value.claim: Peter rides a carbon-road or mountain bicycle
value.correct_statement: He rides a modest hybrid bicycle — the practical middle

value.claim: Peter cannot cook / does not know how to cook
value.correct_statement: He can plainly cook well; he just doesn't cook for himself

value.claim: Peter owns a lot / has an extensive material life
value.correct_statement: He owns almost nothing, but nothing wrong — one correct purpose-built item per domain

value.claim: Peter will feed Vee the same repetitive chicken-and-frozen-vegetables meal
value.correct_statement: Vee braces for this and is wrong — her working-class framework supplies the wrong category

facts.value: Owns a house bought with modest patent income; a retreat, not a showcase
Not model-handsome

Does not see the structural mismatch between his deed-based grammar and Vee's contemporary convention expecting verbal declaration; does not see the costs the vow produces for Vee (her wait, her uncertainty) because his after-register reading does not run.
Genuine focus on getting women something they want; tracks readiness closely (not purely transactional)
Math PhD candidate
dining room table
Driven by an appetite for what it costs someone to step over their own line; interested in transgression rather than social standing
Chose the path that preserved the configuration over three honorable alternatives (disclose, decline, ask harder questions)
sewing and garment construction
Small bench of guest wines (~$10–$35, never made explicit), kept for company to cook with or pour; narrow range learned cold
Operates in bondage and discipline as architecture, rules, the framework inside which transgression is made possible — not the suffering itself
Little or no TV; at most a small afterthought flat panel
a blind spot ('the hole') in his consent-architecture regarding what he makes women into; latent until Randi
Sees Vee fully; the seeing is the love and the love is real
Sews/makes clothing; creates garments as declarations of attention and care (e.g., burgundy skirt for Vee)

Walnut trestle bench with twelve oil-finish coats; custom-built BDSM furniture disguised as low table with fitted wooden top; features padded-leather working surfaces (head, hand grips, chest pad, angled pelvis support, leg supports); adjustable construction; represents his intentionality and craftsmanship
walnut-colored quilt on back of couch; previously on his bed; source of his scent
Makes garments by hand; crafts fitted clothing with precision and care
kit containing moleskin for trail use
At eleven, his father tied a rope from his car to the headstock of Pace's bike and dragged him — resulting in compound fracture at the head of the femur, severe road rash, hospitalization
Inherited from his mother specifically — love-as-currency, the word given and withheld for leverage
An ugly, serious old scar at the hip / head of the femur, plus the ghost of severe road rash; surgical, not rakish; visible only when naked
Built an entire adult identity around being the man who asks (consent-architecture); his reckoning is discovering he found a way to not-ask that his checklist couldn't catch
destructive
Holds a vow that prevents him from saying 'I love you'; the vow does not let him speak the true sentence
Sewing and garment construction; makes clothing pieces as declarations (burgundy skirt for honor society induction)
Mathematics (not engineering)
Thick at the knuckles, indicating habitual use for manual work beyond writing
Invented a useful/elegant solution; the money was a side benefit, the elegant solution was the reward
dining room table
A few good knives, a couple good pans — buy-quality-once-and-stop instinct
On a driveway directly off the highway outside town — cheap land, no sight lines
chivalric/sword-and-sorcery frame from years of imagined courtships shaped his method
Peter = rock/foundation = who he actually is, hidden; Pace = anxious motion covering ground without arriving / imperative 'go' / 'sets the pace' = the D role
Constructs an offer with love, care, and real attention that is structurally calibrated to be undeclinable; this calibration is described as 'the engine of the harm'

Compound fracture scar at hip/head of femur from childhood: father roped Pace's bike to car and dragged him at age eleven; ugly, serious, surgical scar with ghost of severe road rash visible only when naked, decidedly not rakish
does not see the mechanism by which his discipline serves his appetite; the attenuation operates in a register he will not name
Maintains the habit partly by not putting words to the discomfort it produces; the 'not-putting-words' is part of how the habit sustains itself
sewing, tailoring, shirt-making; demonstrates textile work competency alongside woodworking
Knows wine well within the affordable range (~under $35 retail / $70 restaurant)
measuring tape coiled on table
women with dense rule-clusters
sees, remembers, is present—not filing, cataloging, or running accounts
Can plainly cook well (good pans, the peaches); just doesn't, for himself
long-range planner driven to figure out what relationships actually run on
Solvent and unanxious; means finite and known
Kitchen table built two winters ago; two flanking chairs; glass-fronted cabinet built from quartersawn oak in his first year at location
His goodness/consent-architecture is what makes the rationalization available; an ordinary self-interested man would not have the consent-architecture to use as cover
On the autism spectrum with ADHD hyperfocus (NEVER NAMED in text; lives in behavior only)

Operates at excellent, not perfect — 95%. His consent-architecture and chivalric grammar operate at a level that is rare, recognizable, near-impossible. The remaining 5% is where small ordinary lapses live, in registers the architecture does not monitor.
a virtuous man who knows he is virtuous; takes private comfort in knowing he is the better kind of man
Can pass socially, warmly, in short structured doses (e.g., CW bar with defined role); but it costs him; needs quiet the way others need food
Regarded as a social outcast by the sorority house
Doesn't perform status in either direction
Habitually carries basic first-aid and blister kit (moleskin, etc.) on outdoor outings as matter of course preparation for companions' comfort and minor injuries

walnut construction with twelve coats of oil; wooden top disguises it as a table; padded-leather working surfaces including: low end face donut (padded soft, ringed hand grips, high-end massage table design), high end pelvis support (angled forward, shaped to hold woman's hips raised), leg supports extending from sides (separately padded, separately adjustable, each able to widen and lift independent of other)
brilliant, attentive, creative, non-lecherous
By his own grammar he won the princess fairly and she left anyway — incoherent inside the only narrative framework he has
Dances a lot but rarely dates from it; the dancing is the point, not a prelude to romance
folded clean flannel shirt (well-made, no brand tag)
Had available honorable exits (disclosure, refusal, harder questions with Vee) he did not take; the skeptical reader who concludes he should have told her is correct
Cognitive orientation, not a sexual content preference; his mind requires the transgression-event
Competitive amateur powerlifter in the 182 lb class
Defined by two rooms: the shop where he imposes order on the world, and the office where he lets his own mind sprawl
Speaks love through deeds, not words — dress, food, the warm room, patience, every gesture of provision and protection; each deed is a declaration while verbal declaration is not part of the grammar
Makes beautiful things with his hands (handcrafted gifts)
The first destructive appetite in the novel's class — appetite for cognitive engagement through watching a woman break her own rules
Started college at age 15
by every observable metric, fine
Noble, right, and true by his own rules; destruction proceeds because the rules were perfectly executed — 'Oedipus territory'
Pieces curing partway through their finish, undisturbed; most of the house's few furnishings came from this room
There is no mechanism by which he can be brought to revise his (wrong) reading; the grammar is the only one he has

Hyperfocus pattern across multiple domains: patent work, powerlifting, cooking, woodworking, CW dancing — he goes all the way into every domain he enters, owning one correct purpose-built item per domain
Patent/invention, powerlifting, cooking, woodworking, CW dancing — goes all the way into every domain
Expresses love/declaration through deeds (dress, food, warm room, attention, patience) rather than words
His order tracks consequence/stakes, not tidiness as a trait
dining room table
Serial monogamist by structural necessity, not by choice; will lose every woman he loves to the exact instrument he loved her with
West of town, off Route 614, past where it goes to gravel
lesbian
Sautéed chicken and frozen vegetables most days, framed as powerlifting fuel
his discipline is the appetite's instrument — control serves rather than restrains desire
When he watches, old films
Immaculate, for safety reasons (sawdust is a fire risk, carelessly laid tools get damaged or do damage), not aesthetics
Math PhD candidate; started college at 15; finishing at 22–23
Interested in Randi because she is beautiful and clearly a leader — leaders have more to lose, and thus more to transgress
each transgression carefully calibrated to her yes; advances measured against her response
soap, man, inside of gym bag
The expansion from rule-breaking is genuinely loved by the woman and is genuinely the gift Pace gives

chivalric transactionalism: quest, vow, trial, reward; knight wins princess by completing sequence; princess's role is to be won; failure occurs when contract is fulfilled but princess departs, rendering the narrative incoherent
Pace believes: short-cute (Vee or Randi's perception)
personal quilt on back of couch; previously his bed quilt; carries his scent (clean cotton base)
Attention is finest in the present moment; perceives what he produces in a moment accurately
built against the father at the level of action; monitors what he does to women but not what he makes them into
Refusal to read the emotional after-register
measuring tape coiled on table
iterative refinement; refuses inadequacy; multiple attempts until calibration achieved (e.g., collar took four tries)
runs hot; never developed the apparatus for naming his interior states
Accomplished garment-maker with professional-standard knowledge of fabric, fit, construction, material sourcing, custom dress form building, and tailored garment execution
runs hot; a hot fantasist with extraordinary self-control, not a cool strategist with a warm exterior

Characteristically unhurried in physical intimacy; does not rush toward outcomes and deliberately structures scenes around slowness and withholding. This distinguishes him from every prior partner Randi has had.
His method's terminal step is conviction, which has no slot for the integration question
A habituated refusal prepared by family formation, deployed at a specific adult crisis, compounded across years into something that feels structural
lesbian friend; bike riding companion; outside Pace's sexual economy; meets him with masculine register switched off
His self-serving framing is honest from inside but self-serving in a way he cannot detect
mouth does something warm at the corner
His architecture supplies agency-respect framing that makes not-taking honorable exits feel like principle; the architecture's perfection is rationalization machinery in addition to structural limit
sees, remembers, is present — does not file, catalog, or run accounts

chivalric_grammar_via_deeds_not_words; each action is a declaration; verbal declaration withheld until certainty is guaranteed; the vow against premature love-declaration is integral to rather than contradictory with his grammar of deeds
The one genuinely messy room — laptop, workstation, technical journals, white papers, math books, pages of notation radiating from the chair
Speaks Arabic or closely related language with native fluency; orders from Arabic menus in soft, rounded, breath-forward speech; does not call attention to the capability
Mess is allowed because nothing there can burn or warp — it is weightless cognition in physical form, so he lets it sprawl
damage fully metabolized into discipline, defensiveness, and the chivalric kink; acts from, not out
Provides the conditions under which a woman's stepping over her own line becomes thinkable, then bearable, then desired; the line and the stepping are hers

A custom-built BDSM bench in walnut with twelve coats of oil finish. Pace began building it eleven months before the novel opens, predating his relationship with Randi by approximately eight months (he met Randi only three weeks before the novel opens). The bench is a recurring symbol of stable, deliberate intent that exists independently of Randi.
Does not run — he does not see what his prudence costs Vee
Lived privately as a man; privacy is primarily neurological comfort and constitutional, not a moral failing
Aroused by watching a woman break her own rules of her own free will; the content of the rule is secondary, the agency is essential
iterative perfectionism; takes multiple attempts to achieve desired quality (example: collar required four tries)
Operates under finite means / finite-means discipline
Skilled seamstress/tailor; hand-makes garments with flat-lying seams and meticulously perfected collars (four iterations to achieve fit); keeps skill understated
measuring tape coiled on table
Refusal is NOT locally relocatable; apparatus lacks the revisable property
Believes he performed the contract, kept his word, and gave beautiful things made with his hands
A specific blindness covering the case where a cipher/message is hidden under a safe surface

He reads plain surface emotion and romantic interest signals correctly (better than fine). His blindness is specific to the interior aftermath of moments in others—he operates finest in the present moment with a structural inability to track what those moments become in another person's internal experience afterward. NOT general social obtuseness.
After-register blindness — the failure to read what moments become in the other person's interior across time; originated as a choice that became a habit, sustained below conscious access
physically abusive father produced non-consent = coercion as organizing refusal; consent-architecture monitors what he does to women but not what he makes them into

Pace built all the furniture in his home himself, including pieces in quartersawn oak and walnut. His middle-class income could not have purchased such pieces, meaning they are handmade. Randi repeatedly perceives the furniture as expensive but consistently fails to complete the inference that the man she is observing crafted it himself, revealing a blind spot in her assessment of him.
close even warmth; the texture of early morning at his house
Has an 'apparatus'/'habit' that routes emotional expressions from others down a 'sex-channel', reinterpreting intimacy as sexual compatibility

Pace's childhood injury (non-consensual use by father on bicycle) and his adult consent-architecture are isomorphic wounds. His father did not ask; used him for an experience without consent. Pace's adult identity is organized around being the man who asks, creating a paradox: his consent-monitoring checks *actions* but not *outcomes*, leaving a structural blindness to coercion he doesn't consciously recognize.

His appetite is destructive in two ways: it destroys the woman (each rule-breaking permanently changes her, depleting what made her cognitively interesting) and destroys his own access (the appetite eats its own substrate)
A precisely shaped blindness toward what present moments become in the other person's interior afterward
clean-edged fitted riser/platform in corner, self-built
He is practicing, not failing to perceive — making him more morally serious than a pure-hamartia frame allows; the apparatus is built to prevent recognition that he is choosing
Long line from shoulder to waist; muscle definition visible moving under cloth when in motion (climbing)
maintains consistently warm house to enable unhurried presence without concern for guest discomfort

Chivalric cadences: quest, vow, trial, reward. Understands relationships as transactional sequences where his completion of deeds = winning the other's heart. The princess's role is to be won. Views relationship endings through this grammar as incoherent when the won prize departs.

On the 'not-finally-the-lady' reading: he was being careful, protecting her from premature declaration, would have said it when sure; she didn't wait, so she wasn't the one because the one would have waited
more like a musician improvising than an analyst reviewing data; sees, remembers, is present
Possesses a 'consent-architecture' — a framework around agency and consent that he uses to frame his choices as principled
Fully operational; can understand in real time what others (e.g., Vee) are doing emotionally
chose not to disclose prior relationship with Randi and joint seduction plan to Vee in week one; withheld information necessary for Vee's informed consent

The consent ethic is not a discipline that holds the appetite in check; it is part of the appetite itself. Coerced yes is violation not transgression; violations do not engage arousal because agency is missing. Consent and appetite are the same instrument.
Traumatic origin (dragged off bike at eleven) transformed into therapeutic practice; rides for peace, alone and side-by-side in no-eye-contact format with those who cost him nothing neurologically

Fantasy refuge in sword and sorcery shaped his method of seeing women through a chivalric grammatical frame. Years of constructing imagined courtships trained his relational perception; he learned to see actual women by practicing seeing invented ones.

Owns a house (purchased with modest patent income); furnished as a retreat with minimal, quality items: a few good knives, a couple good pans; deliberately avoids excess (12-piece cookware sets); reflects principle of one correct purpose-built item per domain
Not the physical gore but that his father 'thought it would be funny' — the inheritance is not being a person whose say matters

rigorous inside mathematics; applies different (non-rigorous) procedure outside mathematics without noticing the discrepancy; trained to believe nothing not derived from first principles, which compounds his blindness to this pattern

Two sources: (1) Father's physical abuse taught him non-consent = coercion = the organizing refusal of his adult self; his architecture monitors what he does to women. (2) Mother's emotional abuse (love as currency) shaped the gap in his architecture — it monitors consensual acts but not consensual transformation of the person.

Owns a house (purchased with modest patent income); retreat space, not showcase. Kitchen contains a few good knives and a couple good pans—purposeful selection, not 12-piece sets or consumer excess. Reflects minimalist philosophy: one correct item per domain.
Chivalric cadences: quest, vow, trial, reward — a transactional system where the knight wins the princess by completing the sequence
Conventional sex leaves his mind elsewhere

His virtue is not separable from the appetite's destructiveness; the virtue is the appetite's operational form. Careful attention produces the trust that lets rule-breaking go deep enough to alter Vee permanently
Materials prepared by both parents: father → non-looking at what others are; mother → non-looking at what he himself is feeling; deployed at first-love loss as the available adaptation
'Peter' is the true name that predates the wound — the self that hadn't yet learned the lesson, the foundation under the anxious-motion surface; the self that could still say 'I love you'
Father's physical abuse produced non-consent/coercion as organizing refusal; consent-architecture monitors actions taken but not effects produced in partners

finest attention in present moment with specific blindness toward what those moments become in other person's interior afterward; precisely shaped failure of post-moment integration, not general failure
Years of constructing imagined courtships in sword-and-sorcery fantasy refuges gave his method of seeing women its chivalric grammar; he learned to perceive women by practicing on invented ones
Had been sleeping with Randi for a year and had discussed making Vee the third party
95% calibrated; operates consent-architecture and chivalric grammar at rare recognizable near-perfect level with 5% gap where small ordinary lapses live unmonitored
Accomplished garment maker; sews clothing from scratch including tailored shirts with finished seams and fitted collars; does not advertise this skill
Will not declare love until certain, because to declare what he cannot guarantee is to break what declaration is for; operates separately and below the chivalric grammar

Option one: disclose to Vee in week one that he had been sleeping with Randi and that they had discussed making her a third. Withholding this information was itself an agency-violation. He withheld. This was a choice.

Operates consent-architecture and chivalric grammar at rare, near-perfect calibration; 5% operational gaps exist in unmonitored registers where small ordinary lapses occur—humanizing imperfections that do not compromise the architecture's reliability but make him real rather than idealized
Acutely conscious of pain — his and others' — bodily root of safety-tracking everywhere (the shop, the provisioning, the attention to comfort)
close even warmth; a recurring sensory texture of being at his house in the early morning
Arranges true things into a story that lets him feel like a benefactor rather than an architect ('She enjoys the kindness; I'm opening her to a beautiful experience; it's perfect')

Fantasy refuge in sword and sorcery shaped his method of seeing women through chivalric frame; years of constructing imagined courtships provided the grammar for his real-world relational architecture
CW bar / dancing and, later, cycling — described as his two 'cost-free formats' (defined role, mapped interactions)
operates at a level that is rare, recognizable, near-impossible — and not perfect; reliable at ~95%
